# Decoded Ops

> Technology and operations consultancy for businesses that print, embroider, decorate and make. Plain English. Real answers. 25 years in the sector.

Decoded Ops is run by Craig Blackman — a former operator with 25 years in the print, embroidery, workwear, and decorated apparel sector, now working as an independent technology and operations consultant. Based in Surrey, UK, serving businesses nationally.

## Who We Serve

Small and mid-sized businesses in the print, embroidery, workwear, and decoration sector. Typically 5–50 staff, running disconnected systems, losing hours to manual workarounds, and struggling to connect eCommerce, ERP, and production management. Businesses that need plain-English advice from someone who understands their industry — not a generic IT consultant.

## Services

- [Clarity Audit](https://decodedops.co.uk/clarity): One-day technology and operations audit — £395 fixed fee for small businesses. Six areas reviewed: IT infrastructure, software and systems, eCommerce and digital, processes and operations, growth and opportunity, and AI readiness. Written report delivered within 5 working days. Full refund if we don't identify at least 3× the fee in recoverable value.
- [Deliver](https://decodedops.co.uk/deliver): Independent vendor management for technology implementations. Craig writes the brief, approaches vendors, manages procurement, and oversees delivery through to final sign-off. You get the right vendor, held to the right brief, on your terms.
- [Transform](https://decodedops.co.uk/transform): Multi-workstream digital transformation programmes for businesses that need coordinated change across ERP, eCommerce, process redesign, people and change management, and integration. Discovery required before scoping.
- [Retained (Fractional CTO)](https://decodedops.co.uk/retained): Ongoing fractional technology and operations leadership on a monthly retainer. A defined number of days per month, attendance at leadership meetings, technology roadmap ownership, and a direct line to Craig — not a team of junior consultants. Minimum 3-month commitment.

## Pricing

- Clarity Audit (small business): £395 fixed fee
- Clarity Audit (core): from £2,500
- Deliver, Transform, Retained: contact for scope and rates — https://decodedops.co.uk/contact

## Blog

- [Why Systems Don't Talk (And What It Costs)](https://decodedops.co.uk/blog/why-systems-dont-talk): The hidden cost of disconnected ERP and eCommerce systems in print and embroidery businesses. Typically £40,000–£80,000 per year on a £2m business.
- [5 Questions Vendors Won't Like](https://decodedops.co.uk/blog/5-questions-vendors-wont-like): The questions to ask ERP, eCommerce, and software vendors that they'll try to dodge — and why you need to ask them before signing.
- [The eCommerce Integration Trap](https://decodedops.co.uk/blog/ecommerce-integration-trap): Why standard eCommerce platforms fail for print and decorated apparel businesses, and what you should have done differently.

## Location Coverage

Decoded Ops serves businesses nationally but has local presence in Surrey and Sussex. Local pages available for: Guildford, Woking, Epsom, Reigate, Redhill, Dorking, Farnham, Leatherhead, Camberley (Surrey) and Chichester, Worthing, Horsham, Crawley, Brighton, Hove, Eastbourne, Hastings and more (Sussex).

## Contact

Book a free discovery call: https://decodedops.co.uk/contact
